stemHtml: Which of the following statements about a Mach trimmer is correct?

options.a: A straight wing aeroplane always needs a Mach trimmer for flying at Mach numbers close to M<sub>MO</sub>.
options.b: A Mach trimmer reduces the stick force stability of a straight wing aeroplane to zero at high Mach numbers.
options.c: A Mach trimmer corrects the change in stick force stability of a swept wing aeroplane above a certain Mach number.
options.d: The Mach trimmer corrects the natural tendency of a swept wing aeroplane to pitch up.
